ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”
text: Ba aa hɔnɔ kɩ di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kpa paanʋʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ma laa kyaŋ. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ.”
translated: When they heard this, they were furious and wanted to kill him. But Jesus knew their intentions and left that place. He went to the region of Galilee, and many people followed him. He healed all their sick, warning them not to tell others about him.

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: The child who does not listen to advice will not grow well and will not succeed in life.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: I have not seen him since he left the village, but I heard he is doing well now.

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
text: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.
translated: If you are not a member of the family, you cannot inherit the property, and if you are not a member of the family, you cannot inherit the chieftaincy.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: Jesus said to them, "You are the salt of the earth. But if the salt loses its saltiness, how can it be made salty again? It is no longer good for anything, except to be thrown out and trampled underfoot."

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”
text: Ba aa hɔnɔ kɩ di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kpa paanʋʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ma laa kyaŋ. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ.”
translated: And they were all amazed and said to one another, “What is this? A new teaching with authority! He commands even the unclean spirits, and they obey him.”

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: The child who does not listen to advice will not grow well and will not be respected in the community.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: If you don't want to go to the farm, you can't eat the food that is prepared.

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
text: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.
translated: The one who is not a good person, his words are not good, and the one who is a good person, his words are good.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: Jesus said to them, "I tell you the truth, unless a grain of wheat falls to the ground and dies, it remains only a single seed. But if it dies, it produces many seeds."

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”
text: Ba aa hɔnɔ kɩ di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kpa paanʋʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ma laa kyaŋ. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ.”
translated: And he said to them, "Why are you troubled? And why do doubts arise in your hearts?"

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: The child is crying because he fell and hurt his leg, but he is not seriously injured.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: I have not seen him since the day he left to go to the farm and did not return.

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
text: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.
translated: If you don't have a good plan, you will not succeed, but if you have a good plan, you will succeed.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: Jesus said to them, “You are the light of the world. A city built on a hill cannot be hidden.

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”

translated: And they said to him, “We have no wine.” Jesus said to them, “Fill the jars with water.”

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
